data.content: Plan review requested revisions. The proposed Retake Now flow generally matches existing Take! semantics, but the plan’s key assumption about ancestry data is incorrect: RetakesView currently fetches only retake candidates, not the full beat graph. If implementation built parentByBeatId from that filtered list, a rolling grandparent could be missed whenever the immediate parent is not itself in a retake-eligible state. Revise the plan to obtain a complete parent chain source before ancestor checks, then keep the rest of the Stage/Retake Now split and test coverage. Add an explicit regression test for a running grandparent behind a non-retake intermediate parent.
